Citation, License and Contact

Citation

asm3model Python package (2026). Taher Abunama, Xavier Flores-Alsina, Krist V. Gernaey and Ulf Jeppsson.

Upstream license agreement and attribution

The asm3model package is based on a ASM3 / BSM1 implementation within the BSM1 framework.

The upstream DTU/LU notice is included in LICENSE. The package-specific attribution and scope notes are included in THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.

MATLAB/Simulink/C original source attribution named in the current package license and notice files includes:

  • Xavier Flores-Alsina

  • Krist V. Gernaey

  • Ulf Jeppsson

Please preserve the upstream notice and attribution text in LICENSE and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md when redistributing package metadata.

Contact

Dr Taher Abunama (tabunama@gmail.com)

Prof Krist V. Gernaey (kvg@kt.dtu.dk)
